task_completion.description: Draw the outer circle of the hub centered at the origin with a 40mm diameter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A circle centered at the origin in the SolveSpace canvas with a visible diameter constraint of 40 (or radius of 20).

task_completion.description: Draw the inner loop consisting of a 7.5mm radius arc and a symmetric 5mm wide keyway positioned 9.8mm above the origin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An inner cutout profile featuring an arc and a rectangular keyway. Visible constraints should include a 7.5 radius, a 5.0 width for the keyway, and a 9.8 distance from the origin to the top horizontal edge of the keyway.

task_completion.description: Ensure the 2D sketch is fully constrained with 0 degrees of freedom.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace property browser (usually on the left panel) should display '0 degrees of freedom' or 'ok' indicating the sketch is fully constrained.

task_completion.description: Extrude the 2D cross-section to a 3D shape with a thickness of 25mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D solid representation of the keyed hub in the canvas, with an extrusion property or constraint showing a depth/thickness of 25.0.

task_completion.description: Save the project as a SolveSpace (.slvs) file to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the path '~/Documents/SolveSpace/keyed_hub.slvs' or the SolveSpace window title updated to 'keyed_hub.slvs'.

task_completion.description: Export the 3D model as a triangle mesh (.stl) file to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog or file manager window showing the creation of 'keyed_hub.stl' in the '~/Documents/SolveSpace/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to create the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SolveSpace application open with active use of its drawing, constraining, and extrusion tools.

integrity.description: The agent manually built the geometry rather than loading a pre-existing completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Sequential screenshots show the step-by-step construction of the sketch, application of constraints, and the final extrusion.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI modeling process.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running scripts to generate the .slvs or .stl files directly; all file generation should originate from SolveSpace's File menu.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected SLVS file path is /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/keyed_hub.slvs. The expected STL file path is /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/keyed_hub.stl. The 3D model must have an outer diameter of 40.0mm and an extrusion thickness of 25.0mm. The expected volume of the final 3D model is between 26000 and 27400 mm³.
